title: Implementing DeepMind innovation: Deep research API
summary: Google DeepMind has developed a Deep Research API that uses Gemini-powered agents to help complete comprehensive research tasks. The API enables developers to implement these agentic techniques in their applications through Google Cloud.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers the Deep Research API developed by Google DeepMind, which uses Gemini-powered agents to complete comprehensive research tasks. It shows how the API exposes these agentic techniques to developers through Google Cloud. The takeaway: the same research-agent capabilities can be implemented inside developer applications rather than remaining confined to DeepMind's own tools.
